docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,210.00 FILED BY BAYWEST REMODELING CONSTRUCTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GABRIEL G MARTINEZ, DELMEDA V ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 78.15 - SERVED JAN-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GABRIEL G

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506; HEARING HELD; PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY MR. JURGEN WAGEMANS WHO IS PRESENT; DEFENDANT GABRIEL G. MARTINEZ IS ALSO PRESENT. DURING THE HEARING THE DEFENDANT GABRIEL G. MARTINEZ AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,401.10 BY THURSDAY, APRIL-03-2014. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
